references.reason: The same boundary stone from Tenshi's arrival now has a fresh break and an unobstructed white exit, making harm and departure legible together.
A second high-contrast crack across the repaired seam proves Tenshi crossed a known boundary rather than causing abstract drama.
A dark closed gate shows the player is not entering the challenge Tenshi tried to force.
A wide untouched white path to the frame edge makes leaving a mechanical action rather than implied dialogue.
The journal keeps the clear no, departure, Tenshi's restraint, and unresolved strain together.
